action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves external environmental variables including daylight and weather conditions.

action_set_definitions.name: register_excavation_unit
action_set_definitions.description: Formalizes a new excavation unit based on coordinates and size, returning the official alphanumeric nomenclature/ID.

sw_north.description: North coordinate of the Southwest corner.

sw_east.description: East coordinate of the Southwest corner.

size_m.description: Length of the square unit side in meters.

action_set_definitions.name: get_workforce_data
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all archaeological teams, their current assignments, and their fatigue indices.

action_set_definitions.name: assign_team_to_unit
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns a specific workforce team to a registered excavation unit.

team_id.description: Unique identifier of the workforce team.

action_set_definitions.name: update_unit_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the status of an excavation unit (e.g., to 'surveyed', 'digging').

unit_label.description: The alphanumeric nomenclature of the unit.

status.description: The new status for the unit.

action_set_definitions.name: log_administrative_entry
action_set_definitions.description: Submits a formal log entry to the project records.

entry_text.description: Detailed text describing the completed administrative action.

state_description.grid_map: A 2D array representing the excavation site coordinates. Each cell contains 'depth_cm', 'status' (unexplored, surveyed, digging, completed), and 'composition' (soil, rock, clay).
state_description.workforce: Status of archaeological teams, including 'id', 'assigned_cell', and 'fatigue_index'.
state_description.discoveries: Internal record of artifacts found but not yet processed.
